title: angelovangel/nxf-savont
description: Nextflow pipeline for taxonomic profiling for full-length 16S reads (ONT, PacBio)

input_options.title: Input options
input_options.description: Define input reads or POD5 files for basecalling.

pod5.description: Directory with POD5 files (use when basecalling)
pod5.help_text: Path to directory containing POD5 files for basecalling. If this is selected then basecalling will be performed (do not select --reads).

model.help_text: Name of the Dorado model to use (e.g., 'hac', 'sup').

reads.description: BAM/FASTQ file or directory of reads (skips basecalling)
reads.help_text: Path to a single BAM/FASTQ file or directory containing multiple read files (each file is a sample). If this is selected then basecalling will be skipped (do not select --pod5).

samplename.description: Sample name to use for non-barcoded runs
samplename.help_text: Sample name to use when basecalling single-sample POD5 files without barcoding.

outdir.description: The name of the output directory where the results will be saved
outdir.help_text: It is recommended to not change the default output directory

kit.help_text: Name of the barcoding kit used (e.g., 'SQK-16S114-24'). Required when run is barcoded.

samplesheet.description: CSV or XLSX file with sample and barcode information
samplesheet.help_text: Required when --kit is provided. Samplesheet must contain at least columns 'sample' and 'barcode'.

filtering_options.title: Filtering options
filtering_options.description: Options for read length filtering and normalization.

minreadlength.help_text: Minimum read length allowed for SAVONT processing.

maxreadlength.help_text: Maximum read length allowed for SAVONT processing.

subsample.help_text: Proportion of reads to keep (0 to 1). Cannot be used with --norm.

norm.description: Normalize all samples to the lowest read count
norm.help_text: If provided, all samples will be normalized to the same depth (the depth of the smallest sample). Cannot be used with --subsample.

db.help_text: Database to use for SAVONT classification.

species_threshold.help_text: Percentage identity threshold for species level.

genus_threshold.help_text: Percentage identity threshold for genus level.

cpus.help_text: Number of CPUs to allocate for the workflow.
